tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
config firewall policy

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #     delete 2

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #     delete 3

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #     delete 4

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"fortigate-firewall","command":"config firewall address
    edit "DNS-Approved-Host"
        set subnet 192.168.1.2 255.255.255.255
    next
    edit "UbuntuComputer"
        set subnet 192.168.1.3 255.255.255.255
    next
end"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
config firewall address

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (address) #     edit "DNS-Approved-Host"
new entry 'DNS-Approved-Host' added

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (DNS-Approved-Host) #         set subnet 192.168.1.2 255.255. 255.255

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (DNS-Approved-Host) #     next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (address) #     edit "UbuntuComputer"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (UbuntuComputer) #         set subnet 192.168.1.3 255.255.255 .255

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (UbuntuComputer) #     next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (address) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"fortigate-firewall","command":"config firewall service custom
    edit "DNS-8853"
        set tcp-portrange 8853
        set udp-portrange 8853
    next
end"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
config firewall service custom

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (custom) #     edit "DNS-8853"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (DNS-8853) #         set tcp-portrange 8853

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (DNS-8853) #         set udp-portrange 8853

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (DNS-8853) #     next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (custom) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"fortigate-firewall","command":"config firewall policy
    edit 0
        set name "DNS8853-Allow-Approved"
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "DNS-Approved-Host"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "DNS-8853"
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 0
        set name "DNS8853-Deny-Ubuntu"
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action deny
        set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "DNS-8853"
        set logtraffic all
    next
end"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid 868edb74-2aaa-51f1-7993-02c265357be3
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 2
        set name "DNS8853-Allow-Approved"
        set uuid 6e88fc28-335e-51f1-870b-3b3ce8b49a40
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "DNS-Approved-Host"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "DNS-8853"
        set nat enable
next
    edit 3
        set name "DNS8853-Deny-Ubuntu"
        set uuid 6e9bf300-335e-51f1-09ab-15cce80e11db
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "DNS-8853"
        set logtraffic all
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #
